dataset_code: GUS national accounts / Eurostat namq_10_gdp
license_or_reuse_note: Statistics Poland and Eurostat public statistics, cite source table and release vintage
transformation: Use quarterly real GDP growth once a 2026 comparator is released. Current model target is terminal monthly GDP proxy, so quarterly aggregation and real-vs-nominal bridge remain open.
notes: Q1 2026 GUS comparator was not yet available for this manifest pass. Keep non-ready until quarterly growth extraction and model aggregation convention are fixed.

dataset_code: GUS CPI March 2026
license_or_reuse_note: Statistics Poland public statistics, cite CPI release and table
transformation: Use all-items CPI year-over-year rate for March 2026. Model Inflation is already annualized, so compare ratio to ratio.
notes: GUS reported March 2026 consumer prices 3.0% above March 2025.

dataset_code: GUS registered unemployment March 2026
license_or_reuse_note: Statistics Poland public statistics, cite labour-market release and table
transformation: Use registered-unemployment rate at end-March 2026 as the current baseline level comparator.
notes: GUS socio-economic situation release reports registered unemployment rate of 6.1% at end-March 2026.

dataset_code: average paid employment and enterprise-sector gross wage
license_or_reuse_note: Statistics Poland public statistics, cite labour-market release and table
transformation: Model MarketWage is an aggregate wage signal, while source is enterprise-sector gross wage. A direct level comparator needs wage-definition and coverage bridge.
notes: Current model output is available, but wage coverage and gross/net convention must be fixed before numeric pass/fail.

dataset_code: NBP MFI credit aggregates
license_or_reuse_note: NBP official statistics, cite table and release vintage
transformation: Normalize NBP credit stocks to current-price GDP and map firm, consumer, mortgage, and NBFI splits to model credit outputs.
notes: Terminal bank and credit outputs exist, but household/firm/mortgage/NBFI split and GDP denominator bridge still need extraction before numeric pass/fail.

dataset_code: MF and Eurostat debt comparator family
license_or_reuse_note: MF and Eurostat public statistics, cite table and release vintage
transformation: Family row retained for coverage. Numeric debt validation uses the PDP and ESA2010 peer rows below while domestic and EDP definitions remain separate.
notes: Use peer rows for domestic fiscal-rule debt and ESA2010 debt ratios. Quarterly path and holder composition bridges remain open.

dataset_code: MF Budget Act 2026 PDP-to-GDP forecast
license_or_reuse_note: Ministry of Finance public communication, cite release date
transformation: Compare MF public-finance-law debt forecast to model domestic fiscal-rule DebtToGdp terminal value. Source percent of GDP is converted from 53.8% to ratio.
notes: MF Budget Act 2026 communication reports public-debt-to-GDP forecast of 53.8% in 2026.

dataset_code: Eurostat euro indicators 2-22042026-ap government debt
license_or_reuse_note: Eurostat public news release and government finance statistics, cite release date
transformation: Compare Eurostat general-government gross debt to model ESA2010 debt/GDP. Source percent of GDP is converted from 59.7% to ratio.
notes: Eurostat release 2-22042026-ap reports Poland general-government gross debt at 59.7% of GDP for 2025.

dataset_code: NBP balance of payments current account
license_or_reuse_note: NBP official balance-of-payments statistics, cite table and release vintage
transformation: Use monthly or quarterly BoP current-account balance, annualize where needed, and normalize to the same GDP convention used by model outputs.
notes: CurrentAccount output exists, but BoP cadence, GDP normalization, and component sign convention still need extraction before numeric pass/fail.

dataset_code: GUS active enterprises by size class
license_or_reuse_note: Statistics Poland public statistics, cite active-enterprises release and table
transformation: Family row retained for coverage. Numeric validation uses the size-class peer rows below.
notes: Use peer rows for micro, small, medium, and large shares. The aggregate family row stays non-ready to avoid double-counting the micro comparator.

dataset_code: GUS active enterprises by size class
license_or_reuse_note: Statistics Poland public statistics, cite active-enterprises release and table
transformation: Compare published active-enterprise micro share to terminal living-firm micro share.
notes: GUS Q3 2025 release reports micro entities at 95.9% of active enterprises.

dataset_code: GUS active enterprises by size class
license_or_reuse_note: Statistics Poland public statistics, cite active-enterprises release and table
transformation: Compare published active-enterprise small share to terminal living-firm small share.
notes: GUS Q3 2025 release reports small enterprises at 3.4% of active enterprises.

dataset_code: GUS active enterprises by size class
license_or_reuse_note: Statistics Poland public statistics, cite active-enterprises release and table
transformation: Compare published active-enterprise medium share to terminal living-firm medium share.
notes: GUS Q3 2025 release reports medium enterprises at 0.6% of active enterprises.

dataset_code: GUS active enterprises by size class
license_or_reuse_note: Statistics Poland public statistics, cite active-enterprises release and table
transformation: Compare published active-enterprise large share to terminal living-firm large share.
notes: GUS Q3 2025 release reports large enterprises at 0.1% of active enterprises.

dataset_code: GUS registrations and bankruptcies of enterprises
license_or_reuse_note: Statistics Poland public statistics, cite registrations-and-bankruptcies release and table
transformation: GUS legal bankruptcy count is available, but model FirmDeaths counts all simulated firm exits and needs a legal-bankruptcy bridge before READY validation.
notes: GUS Q4 2025 release reports 102 enterprises declared bankruptcy. Model FirmDeaths is broader than legal bankruptcies, so this remains partial.

dataset_code: banking-sector-prudential
license_or_reuse_note: Cite KNF source and release vintage
transformation: Compare minima and terminal distribution under matching regulatory definition
notes: Needs KNF prudential table mapping for CAR, liquidity, and NPL definitions.

dataset_code: household-budget-or-EU-SILC
license_or_reuse_note: Cite source, survey wave, and microdata access rules
transformation: Map survey income, consumption, or wealth concept to terminal household summary. Current model target is Gini_Individual, but source concept is not selected.
notes: Terminal household fields exist, but the publication-grade survey concept and household-weighting bridge remain open.

dataset_code: GUS sector national accounts / Eurostat namq_10_a10
license_or_reuse_note: Statistics Poland and Eurostat public statistics, cite source table and release vintage
transformation: Crosswalk source NACE/ESA sectors to six model sectors and compare sector output shares or growth. Current row tracks manufacturing output only until peer rows are added.
notes: Sector output columns exist, but source-sector to six-sector model crosswalk and peer rows remain open.

dataset_code: NBP table A and external-price comparator family
license_or_reuse_note: NBP, ECB, and Eurostat public statistics, cite table and release vintage
transformation: Family row retained for coverage. Numeric FX validation uses the EUR/PLN peer row below, while external-price and reserve comparators remain open.
notes: Use the EUR/PLN peer row for exchange-rate level. External price indices, reserves, and intervention rows still need source-specific extraction.

dataset_code: NBP table 082/A/NBP/2026 EUR
license_or_reuse_note: NBP official exchange-rate table, cite table number and publication date
transformation: Use NBP table A average EUR/PLN as the model-start exchange-rate level comparator.
notes: NBP table 082/A/NBP/2026 reports EUR average exchange rate 4.2537 on 2026-04-29.

dataset_code: housing-prices-and-mortgage-risk
license_or_reuse_note: Cite NBP or KNF source and release vintage
transformation: Align national and regional HPI, mortgage stock, and default-risk definitions
notes: Structural row for housing and mortgage target family. Needs comparator source bridge.

dataset_code: MF and Eurostat fiscal-stance comparator family
license_or_reuse_note: MF and Eurostat public statistics, cite release or table vintage
transformation: Family row retained for coverage. Numeric deficit validation uses the Eurostat peer row below while expenditure and fiscal-rule episode bridges remain separate.
notes: Use peer rows for deficit and expenditure. Spending mix, debt-service, cash-accrual, and fiscal-rule episode bridges remain open.

dataset_code: Eurostat euro indicators 2-22042026-ap government deficit
license_or_reuse_note: Eurostat public news release and government finance statistics, cite release date
transformation: Compare Eurostat deficit to model DeficitToGdp using positive-deficit sign convention. Source deficit of -7.3% of GDP is sign-flipped to +0.073.
notes: Eurostat release 2-22042026-ap reports Poland general-government deficit at 7.3% of GDP for 2025.

target: Fiscal stance - state budget expenditure plan 2026
dataset_code: MF Budget Act 2026 state-budget expenditure
license_or_reuse_note: Ministry of Finance public communication, cite release date
transformation: State-budget expenditure plan is available, but model GovDomesticBudgetOutlays is central-budget domestic monthly outlays and needs aggregation and coverage mapping before numeric validation.
notes: MF Budget Act 2026 communication reports state-budget expenditure planned at PLN 918.9bn. The ESA general-government and model domestic-budget coverage bridge remains open.

dataset_code: NBP policy rates and market-yield comparator family
license_or_reuse_note: NBP and market-source public statistics, cite decision or table vintage
transformation: Family row retained for coverage. Numeric policy-rate validation uses the NBP reference-rate peer row below, while WIBOR, bond-yield, GPW, and corporate-spread rows remain open.
notes: Use the NBP reference-rate peer row for policy-rate level. Market-rate, bond-yield, GPW, and spread comparators still need source-specific extraction.

dataset_code: MPC decision 2026-03-04 NBP reference rate
license_or_reuse_note: NBP official MPC communication, cite decision date
transformation: Use the NBP reference rate as an annual-rate ratio and compare directly to RefRate.
notes: MPC communication for 3-4 March 2026 set the NBP reference rate at 3.75%.
